languages.text: "Я узнаю эти цифры. Помню еще из своей старой жизни".
"I recognise these numbers. A memory from my old life."
languages.original_text: "Я узнаю эти цифры. Помню еще из своей старой жизни".

traits.locale_text: "I recognise these numbers. A memory from my old life."
"I recognise these numbers. A memory from my old life."
"I recognise these numbers. A memory from my old life."

languages.text: 「この数字はわかる。昔の記憶だ。」
languages.original_text: "I recognise these numbers. A memory from my old life."

languages.text: "Bu sayıları tanıyorum. Eski hayatımdan bir anı."
languages.original_text: "I recognise these numbers. A memory from my old life."

traits.locale_text: "Bu sayıları tanıyorum. Eski hayatımdan bir anı."

languages.text: “这些代码我有印象，他们埋藏在我久远的记忆里。”
languages.original_text: "I recognise these numbers. A memory from my old life."

traits.locale_text: “这些代码我有印象，他们埋藏在我久远的记忆里。”

languages.text: "Ich erkenne diesen Zahlen. Eine Erinnerung aus meinem alten Leben."
languages.original_text: "I recognise these numbers. A memory from my old life."

traits.locale_text: "Ich erkenne diesen Zahlen. Eine Erinnerung aus meinem alten Leben."

languages.text: « Je reconnais ces nombres... Des souvenirs de mon ancienne vie. »
languages.original_text: "I recognise these numbers. A memory from my old life."

traits.locale_text: « Je reconnais ces nombres... Des souvenirs de mon ancienne vie. »

languages.text: «Reconozco estos números. Un recuerdo de mi vida anterior».
languages.original_text: "I recognise these numbers. A memory from my old life."

traits.locale_text: «Reconozco estos números. Un recuerdo de mi vida anterior».
